changes_made: Renamed k8s_certificate_expiration_check to k8s_ingress_certificate_expiration_check for consistency with resource naming
review_notes: The functions are generally accurate and map well to Kubernetes security controls related to TLS configuration in Ingress resources. However, the function k8s_certificate_expiration_check was renamed to k8s_ingress_certificate_expiration_check to maintain consistency with the resource naming pattern and to clarify that it pertains to Ingress resources.
naming_improvements: Ensure all function names start with the resource they pertain to, such as 'ingress' in this context.
title: Requirement 2.3.1
step1_reasoning: The control focuses on ensuring SSL/TLS configurations are secure and certificates are valid and not expired. In Kubernetes, this maps to ensuring that Ingress resources are configured with TLS, certificates used by Ingress controllers are valid and not expired, and that secure TLS protocols are enforced.
